c52c07d2949c.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
c52c07d2949c.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
c52c07d2949c.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

fe4fe5e1ee52.title: Renew formal trust proof before it becomes a visible drag
fe4fe5e1ee52.description: Last inspected 2.1 years ago. A stale inspection date erodes trust scoring and signals to customers that compliance isn't actively managed. Request a voluntary re-inspection once you're confident of a strong result.
fe4fe5e1ee52.expected_upside: Fresh compliance proof, trust signal renewal
fe4fe5e1ee52.management_implication: Stale trust is a hidden ceiling on your overall position.

31495cce2514.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
31495cce2514.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

a052873aebd6.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
a052873aebd6.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
a052873aebd6.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

20ffd25345f0.title: Accelerate review volume — you're credible but not dominant
20ffd25345f0.description: At 173 reviews, your rating is stable but not commanding. Venues with 200+ reviews rank higher in Maps. A post-visit review prompt would compound monthly.
